## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off growth engagement with Augment Code, focusing on capturing market demand and accelerating user acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment Code has a superior product but lacks awareness; goal is to become "the best AI coding assistant the world has heard of"](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Growth strategy focuses on capturing existing demand rather than educating the market](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Key metrics: 63% activation rate, 9% trial-to-pay conversion, $50/month plan (new higher-tier plans coming)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Influencer marketing and YouTube content are driving significant user growth](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2783.0)

## Topics

### Current Market Position

  - [Recently launched self-serve, improved product quality](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Consistently winning against competitors (e.g., Cursor) in sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Superior performance on large codebases (e.g., 350,000 files) due to advanced context engine](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Customer Acquisition Strategy

  - [Primarily organic growth and word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2591.0)
  - [$250k/month on paid ads, mostly search (capturing intent)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [YouTube ads and influencer partnerships showing strong results](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2687.0)
  - [Exploring top-of-funnel strategies (e.g., micro-sites, tools, newsletters)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2972.0)

### Product Differentiation

  - [Excels at understanding large, complex codebases](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Default 200k context window (larger than competitors)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Proprietary code retrieval and real-time indexing](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Strong customer support and solutions engineering](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)

### Growth Metrics and Goals

  - [Currently at 6,000 sign-ups per day (organic)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2794.0)
  - [Aiming for 3x growth in the near term](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2758.0)
  - [LTV estimate: $150 (conservative)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3171.0)
  - [Willing to spend up to $200 to acquire a user](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)

### Brand Positioning

  - [Targeting software engineers who want to write code with AI](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
  - [Avoiding association with "script kitties" or casual coders](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)
  - [Exploring lifestyle brand marketing tactics for developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3360.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule 1-hour product deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3487.0)
  - [Arrange content and branding deep dive (potentially next week)](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3517.0)
  - [Set up interviews with users who switched from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3553.0)
  - [Connect with Augment's user researcher for ideal customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3609.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide week-to-week plan and schedule regular syncs](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3528.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue extensive research and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/XCLC6Fz8F3z1aCXRhddWqN5CUUzavPzs?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)

action_items.description: Send team@augmentcode.com email for GrowthX access to internal systems
Schedule 1hr product deep dive. Prep sales-style demo or recording. Include tech expert for Q&A if possible
Identify 2-3 customers who switched from Cursor/Windsor. Share contact info with GrowthX for interviews
Connect GrowthX with Augment's user researcher for ICP insights
